title: Samara Kebyc
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Otheruses|Samara}} {{Character |type=Corporate |image=[[File:Kebyc.jpg]] |name=Samara Kebyc |homeworld=[[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]]{{DB|character|kebyc|Kebyc}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=She/her |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Brown]]{{Film|V}} |feathers= |eyes= |skin=Light |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=[[Cloud City Miner's Guild]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Well, you see, since we're a small operation, we don't fall into the jurisdiction of the Empire.''"
"''So you're part of the Mining Guild, then?''"
"''No, not actually. Our operation is small enough not to be noticed.|Lando Calrissian explains Cloud City to Leia Organa|}} '''Samara Kebyc''', a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] working in [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] on her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], was a senior [[Accountant/Legends|accountant]] for the [[Cloud City Miner's Guild]], [[Administrator/Legends|administering]] the annual dues of the [[Mining/Legends|miners]] with membership in the organization. Kebyc opposed corruption, acting at [[Time/Legends|times]] against other members of the guild. She was present in Cloud City when [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], the [[City/Legends|city's]] [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]], called for an evacuation before [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces could [[Occupation of Bespin|subjugate]] the mining operation. ==Biography== [[File:Kebyc-esb.png|thumb|left|270px|Kebyc holds a conversation with other Bespinites.]] A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], Samara Kebyc{{InsiderCite|148|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: The Cloud City Wing Guards}} worked in{{CCG|set=Cloud City Limited|cardname=Kebyc}} the [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna gas]] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] [[City/Legends|colony]] [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]] above her [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]], during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. There, she was a member of the [[Cloud City Miner's Guild]], an organization under the jurisdiction of Cloud City's [[Baron Administrator/Legends|Baron Administrator]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]].{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20040930bespinmain|text=Bespin: Action Tidings|int=Bespin: Action Tidings}} The Miner's Guild was not part of the [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]-spanning [[Mining Guild/Legends|Mining Guild]], the attentions of which the Cloud City [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation was too small to attract. Kebyc served as a senior [[Accountant/Legends|accountant]] for the guild, and her duties included [[Administrator/Legends|administration]] of the members' annual dues. Kebyc sought to end corruption among other members of the Miner's Guild. With the aid of [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Bespin Wing Guard]] [[Gir Endac]], she tracked down several corrupt guild officials. Kebyc was present in a Cloud City corridor in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' conversing with other [[Bespinite/Legends|residents]], as Calrissian led [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]]—representatives of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]—past on the way to a meeting in which Calrissian handed the three over to the custody of the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], in an effort to prevent further Imperial intervention in Cloud City's operation. When Imperial forces nonetheless descended upon Cloud City to [[Occupation of Bespin|occupy]] the facility in violation of his agreement with Vader, Calrissian ordered the city's inhabitants to evacuate. ==Personality and traits== Samara Kebyc fought corruption among the members of the guild. She had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and light skin. ==Equipment== Kebyc wore a gray robe over pants of the same color, and wore dark shoes. ==Behind the scenes== Samara Kebyc first appeared as an unnamed and uncredited extra in the [[1980]] film [[Star Wars: Episode V The Empire Strikes Back|''Star Wars'': Episode V ''The Empire Strikes Back'']], in which she can be seen having a discussion as Lando Calrissian, Han Solo, Princess Leia, and Chewbacca walk past. She was provided a surname and a detailed character history through the [[November]] [[1997]] ''[[Cloud City Limited]]'' expansion set of the [[Decipher]] [[Star Wars Customizable Card Game|''Star Wars'' Customizable Card Game]]. The [[March 11]], [[2014]]{{TitanMagazines|url=t/star-wars-insider/us/148|text=Star Wars Insider Issue #148}} [[Rogues Gallery (department)|''Rogues Gallery'']] department from [[Star Wars Insider 148|''Star Wars Insider'' 148]] first identified her full name. ==Appearances== *{{Film|V}} {{1st}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Samara Kebyc}} *{{CCG|set=Cloud City Limited|cardname=Kebyc}} {{1stID|Kebyc}} *{{SWArchive|url=fans/media/womenofsw/index.html?page=4|text=The Women of the Original ''Star Wars'' Trilogy}} *{{DB|character|kebyc|Kebyc}} *{{InsiderCite|148|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: The Cloud City Wing Guards}} {{1stID|Samara}} *{{SWE|characters|landocalrissian|Lando Calrissian}} {{Video}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |nl=Kebyc }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Kebyc, Samara}} [[Category:Accountants]] [[Category:Bespinites]] [[Category:Businesspeople]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Individuals with she/her pronouns]]
